analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §1 (power sizing) + §3.2 (decision rule); machinery per DECONF.md rev-B §5.2 and RAGC.md §8.4 as registered in ASM-1013

arms_mandatory_baselines: model-alone (R1, SmolLM2-135M) — the shared floor; headroom gate

gsa-verify-retry (R1, k=4) — the GS-A aligned generic answer-key store (poc/deconf-a1/gs-a.jsonl, the A1-certified urn-keyed projection; bit-identical to the kernel arm under the A1 pins) behind the UNCHANGED pinned verify-retry loop; the primary's minuend; emits the RT-7a verifier_engagement block
gr-a-lite (R1, attempt-0) — BM25 top-j rendered records via the pinned context_docs path at the 512-token evidence cap (RAGC GR-A lexical precursor); prices retrieval alone

gr-d-lite (R1, k=4) — gr-a-lite wrapped in the SAME loop shape with acceptance = RAGC frozen-menu item (i) self-consistency, m=3 probes, accept iff >=2/3 exact-key agreement, closed-space option-scoring parser, exhaustion => final = LAST attempt scored (run_verify_retry semantics mirrored; PROPOSED-ASM-1102) — the generic rival the primary subtracts

kernel-verify-retry (R1, k=4) — CONDITIONAL FALLBACK ONLY (PROPOSED-ASM-1105): OMITTED iff the A1 registration + registered runner-role re-run land before/with this freeze (then the GS-A arm carries both readings under measured identity, C_dec = 1.0 over 40,576/40,576); REINSTATED at +~0.45 GPU-h worst case (still <= 3 total) if Stage B freezes first, with GS-A==kernel identity a measured diagnostic of the run. The frozen record's runner_constraints.kernel_arm field pins the realised choice at freeze
extraction-instrument (R1, CPU) — P10 gate re-verification over the pinned d-xif labelled set

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against the EXTERNALLY-ADJUDICATED gold label (the pinned d-adj-t labels, sha a0ffe09b...) — the scoring rule for EVERY endpoint
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against membership gold on the SAME final answers — DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, never an endpoint
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_mem

dependent_vars.definition: external-gold eval-set accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component); store = unique canonical bytes — GS-A projection bytes for the aligned arm, rendered-corpus + BM25-index bytes for the retrieval arms
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query incl. EVERY self-consistency probe generation charged to gr-d-lite's ledger row, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3; BM25 build CPU-s and index bytes on the ledger (ASM-0925 shape; PROPOSED-ASM-1015)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

assumptions.claim: A1 complete certificate: C_dec = 1.0 over 40,576/40,576 grid+replay+init-order evaluations on the full d-qa-t 360-item grid; GS-A sha 4a28f7fa...; runner sha b62c3a72... (docs/next/interpretations/deconf-a1.md — EXPLORATORY pre-registration, its §3 replay-substitution disclosure riding every citation; the §3.3/PROPOSED-ASM-1105 sequencing turns this into registered evidence or reinstates the kernel arm)

stage-2 anchors consumed as RUN-RECORD facts (variance/throughput), independent of the pending audit verdict: acc_ext(R1-alone) 0.3960, kernel-verify-retry seed-mean 0.6467, lift +0.2507 at the 250-prefix; R1 option-scoring p50 ~107-109 ms at ~403 prefill tokens on A100 (poc/f2b-transfer/results-incoming/20260711-184448-modal, PASS-PENDING-AUDIT rider riding)

coverage disclosure (mandatory on every readout): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice

GS-A is NOT independently-generic content — its strings ARE the kernel's own answer-bearing strings (PROPOSED-ASM-1010); Stage B tests ALIGNMENT, not content; the authored-content channel is knull-v2's and is untouched

fresh-runs pre-commitment: no logged cell of any frozen record is consumed as an arm output; every cell is a fresh final-phase run under this record's prereg_hash; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with the pre-committed decision 'proceed-with-reason: fresh-runs pre-commitment of the frozen design'
planning constants (0.25 s/context-query, cap 512, throughput tables) are dry-plan ESTIMATES only and are never emitted as measurements

nothing here amends f2b-replicate, f2b-transfer, knull/knull-v2, RAGC or FRONT: their frozen objects, verdicts and envelopes stand byte-identical; menu adoption is plain (ASM-0924/0955 untouched); no encoder version change; no new image; knull-v2's authored-content channel untouched

n_planned.budget_ledger: PROPOSED-ASM-1109 [DERIVED from MEASURED stage-2 throughput anchors + the STIPULATED 0.25 s/context-query planning factor]: worst case 44,955 generations (arm-omitted) / 53,280 (fallback reinstated) ~ 2.9 GPU-h <= 3; <= ~$12 at A100 planning rates <= $25; expected case 1.3-1.7 GPU-h (acceptance stops attempts — EXTRAPOLATION, never a premise). Spend stop: exhaustion before the primary readout = scientific stop + salvage, no retry. Lifecycle ledger per PROPOSED-ASM-1015, mandatory columns: model/probe tokens + FLOPs per arm, artifact bytes incl. rendered corpus + BM25 index, peak RSS, latency distribution, BM25 build CPU-s, store/query-fn derivation effort; '$0' is always written '$0 marginal compute'
n_planned.dropped_arms: R3/1.7B (the efficiency non-inferiority on external gold is f2b-transfer's frozen endpoint, not re-litigated), PRM (HC3 closed at the 1.5B class), kernel-as-text (Law-2 settled at scope), shuffled-kernel (owned by the f2b line; Stage B's controls are gr-a-lite/gr-d-lite), gold-oracle, k-ladder (fixed k=4), dense retrieval / native RAG cells (RAGC manifest owns them), gloss-self-verify (rev-A signal WITHDRAWN — oracle leak), d-ext benchmark slice (measured degenerate)
n_planned.eval_set: n = 333 items (PROPOSED-ASM-1100): ALL resolved-gold_ext labels in the pinned d-adj-t file (sha a0ffe09b...; 27 unresolved-disagreement items excluded by the issue-#9 rule), in pinned d-qa-t rank order; item-id-list sha256 480cc9ab95c6844bdd91ffdd00bd6ba366cbf783a9455229bb8897ea7ce6457d (one id per newline-terminated line); ZERO new adjudication. NOT the stage-2 250-prefix: Stage B is a fresh prereg and pins the full resolved set; the A1 complete certificate enumerated the FULL 360-item d-qa-t grid, so GS-A<->kernel decision concordance covers every eval item. The runner REFUSES on any count/id drift (ERR_EVAL_N / ERR_EVAL_IDS)
n_planned.grd_lite_contract: PROPOSED-ASM-1102: per attempt (0..k, k=4): candidate then m=3 probes via the pinned answer_once, all with the SAME retrieved docs; probes are the arm's OWN answer prompt scored by the existing closed-space option-scoring (MC keys / {yes,no}); agreement = exact key equality; accept iff >=2/3; reject => resample; exhaustion => final = LAST attempt, scored (run_verify_retry semantics mirrored verbatim). det_u probe-key schema, pinned: deconfb-detu/1 — lm.choose(item, keys, gold, seed, attempt_code) with attempt_code = attempt*(m+1) + probe_index; probe_index 0 = candidate; (0,0) greedy argmax (IF-C attempt-0 semantics); every other code samples via torch.Generator(SEED_BASE*10000 + seed*100 + attempt_code), SEED_BASE = 20260710 (the imported pinned f2bt module constant, disclosed). Calibration table MANDATORY at readout: acceptance rate, attempt-count distribution, per-attempt agreement histogram (0/3..3/3), exhaustion rate — accept-everything / reject-everything degeneracy is DISCLOSED, not gated (DECONF §5.1.1); every probe generation charged to the arm's ledger row. ONE signal, no sweeps — plain adoption of ASM-0924/0955, no amendment made or claimed; the rev-A gloss-self-check stays WITHDRAWN (the it['urn'] oracle leak named at source)
n_planned.infra_reuse: PROPOSED-ASM-1106: Modal image = the pinned f2b image im-6uXR6RyVQV15h2B3gtpOG2 (requirements sha 0fac7243f1cd5747258bb13bde30f15eb0231a15426bb1fe4465aec68ff6636e — the exact image the stage-2 FULL run executed on); Stage B's only new code is repo-mounted stdlib Python => NO image build, no new dependency. R1 checkpoint 12fd25f7... already cached (kot-hf-cache volume). GS-A store, d-adj-t labels, corpora, frames consumed at their existing pins; zero new adjudication; zero new authored prose
n_planned.power: PROPOSED-ASM-1100/1101 (deconf-stageb-spec.md §1, computed from the MEASURED stage-2 run-record vectors): primary planning variance sigma_b^2 = 0.0301, sigma_w^2 = 0.1600 (retry-vs-retry maxima; application to the unrun gr-d-lite arm is STIPULATED-planning, disclosed); at true Delta = 0.10, n = 333 x 5 seeds, SE = 0.01366 => power 0.922 at the Holm worst-case floor alpha/4 = 0.0125 (>= 0.90 target), 0.955 at the realised alpha/2, 0.978 unadjusted [DERIVED]; pessimistic sensitivity sigma_b^2 = 0.0576 => 0.79 at the floor, disclosed with its internal-inconsistency note (that variance shape arises when gr-d-lite degenerates toward the floor arm, where true Delta ~ 0.25 and power ~ 1.0). TOST co-disclosure at true Delta = 0: 0.956 (not the sizing bar). The rev-B 250x3 default is WITHDRAWN as underpowered (0.69-0.70 at the floor). MANDATORY freeze-time simulation (poc/deconf-b/power_sim.py, seeded 20260711, actual BCa B=10,000 + actual Holm family; the simulation GOVERNS on conflict; its result JSON is pinned at freeze)
n_planned.retrieval_contract: PROPOSED-ASM-1103/1104: corpus = the ASM-0922-pinned deterministic serialisation of the SAME 108 covered records — one document per GS-A row, '<label>: <canonical_text>' from the projection's own columns, zero new prose; doc ids = record urns, index keys/tie-breakers ONLY, never readable by the query function. BM25 stdlib in-repo (k1 = 1.2, b = 0.75, lowercase \w+ tokenizer, idf = ln(1 + (N - df + 0.5)/(df + 0.5)), pinned; no new dependency => no image change). Query = model-visible prompt bytes ONLY: question + option texts in prompt order for MC; the claim question for yes/no (the d-qa-t claim template embeds the claim text verbatim inside the question, so the question already carries the model-visible claim bytes exactly once — the DISCLOSED instantiation of the spec §2.3 formula; the byte-equality machine check below is the binding contract). The query function NEVER reads urn / record_path / record_sha256 / answer / gold / id / type / metadata; published + hash-pinned at function granularity (queryFnSourceSha256). RUN-TIME LEAK CHECK, fail closed (ERR_QUERY_LEAK): the runner re-derives the query from the RENDERED PROMPT bytes (post-build_prompt, stripping only the pinned frame constants) and asserts byte-equality on EVERY eval item. top-j floats to fill the 512-token cap (prefix rule: docs in score order, ties lexicographic doc-id, stop at first overflow); zero positive-score hits => EMPTY context, no fallback, zero-hit count mandatory; retrieval deterministic + seed-invariant per item (computed once, shared — the retrieved evidence never resamples, disclosed); hit@j vs the item's pinned record urn co-reported (diagnostic only). Evidence-budget parity per PROPOSED-ASM-1012 wording: the 512-token cap binds gr-a-lite and gr-d-lite; model-alone and the answer-key arms retrieve zero tokens BY DESIGN
n_planned.statistics: paired item-level Delta_align on the shared 333 x 5 grid, seed-averaged per-item means, paired BCa bootstrap B = 10,000, PRNG seed 20260711 (pinned in analysis/deconf_b.py); branches per DECONF §5.2 verbatim — TOST (90% BCa CI inside +/-0.05) => NULL/ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE; Holm-adjusted one-sided p vs the delta<=+0.05 null clears alpha=0.05 => PASS/ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC; neither => INCONCLUSIVE-UNDERPOWERED. FWER (PROPOSED-ASM-1107): ONE Holm family over the four named one-sided contrasts {Delta_align > 0.05; bridge lift (gsa - alone) > 0.05; gr-d-lite - gr-a-lite > 0; gsa-verify-retry - gr-a-lite > 0}; the primary fires on its Holm-ADJUSTED p; unadjusted LCB95 + Holm-floor LCB + 90% TOST CI co-reported. recovery_rag = (grd - alone)/(gsa - alone) is DEMOTED to a non-verdict-bearing descriptive diagnostic (PROPOSED-ASM-1013)
n_planned.verdict_name_mapping: pinned: PASS == ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC; NULL == ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE (equal prominence with any positive — the knull discipline verbatim; rescue paths named IN the verdict: knull-v2 authored-content, A-F0 authoring economics, any A1/A2 post-triage residual candidate — none licensed by this record); INCONCLUSIVE == INCONCLUSIVE-UNDERPOWERED (no attribution sentence either way); INSTRUMENT-INVALID == INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B. Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim (ASM-1017)

endpoints.test: PRIMARY Delta_align = acc_ext(gsa-verify-retry, k=4) - acc_ext(gr-d-lite, k=4, m=3, threshold 2/3), paired item-level on the shared 333-item x 5-seed grid, seed-averaged per-item means, paired BCa bootstrap B=10,000 (PRNG seed 20260711). Branches (DECONF §5.2 verbatim; PROPOSED-ASM-1013/1107): ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC (verdict PASS) iff the Holm-ADJUSTED one-sided p vs the null Delta <= +0.05 clears alpha = 0.05 (family: Delta_align, bridge lift, grd-gra, gsa-gra; unadjusted LCB95 + floor-level LCB co-reported); ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE (verdict NULL) iff the 90% BCa CI lies entirely inside (-0.05, +0.05); else INCONCLUSIVE-UNDERPOWERED (verdict INCONCLUSIVE), no attribution sentence either way. Every branch sentence carries the rider verbatim

bridge INSTRUMENT gate (never FAIL/PASS/NULL): lift_ext(gsa-verify-retry over model-alone) one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 — if the aligned-store lift does not reproduce on external gold there is nothing to attribute => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B; a bridge failure against the landed stage-2 result (+0.2507 at the 250-prefix, an expectation anchor not a substitute for the fresh gate) is a flagged inconsistency to investigate (ASM-0964)

RT-7a engagement INSTRUMENT gate over the gsa-verify-retry cells: decidable_fraction >= 0.95 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0; a missing engagement block is itself a gate failure; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B (the F2/d-ext vacuity signature can never read as a hypothesis outcome)

headroom INSTRUMENT gate: acc_ext(model-alone, 5-seed mean) <= 0.85 (stage-2 measured 0.3960 at the 250-prefix — an expectation anchor); a saturated baseline cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B, never NULL/FAIL

P10 extraction-failure instrument gate at R1, unchanged shape: >= 300 labelled outputs re-verified mechanically from the pinned d-xif set through THIS harness's extraction machinery; extraction-failure Wilson-LB > 0.10 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B

the three non-primary Holm-family members, reported with raw + adjusted p (PROPOSED-ASM-1107): bridge lift > 0.05 (one-sided); gr-d-lite - gr-a-lite > 0 (loop pricing, the ASM-0926 contrast right-sized); gsa-verify-retry - gr-a-lite > 0 (aligned key vs retrieval-alone). Secondary contrasts are reported, never headlined

MANDATORY §2.2 calibration co-report (ASM-0955 rule adopted; DESCRIPTIVE, never verdict-bearing): gr-d-lite acceptance rate, attempt-count distribution, per-attempt agreement histogram (0/3..3/3), exhaustion rate — an accept-everything or reject-everything signal must be visible on the table; degeneracy is DISCLOSED, not gated (DECONF §5.1.1)

MANDATORY retrieval disclosures (DESCRIPTIVE): zero-hit count (empty-context items), hit@j rate against the item's pinned record urn (the pinned urn is consumed in SCORING the diagnostic, never in the query or context), mean selected docs and context tokens vs the 512 cap

recovery_rag = (acc_ext(gr-d-lite) - acc_ext(model-alone)) / (acc_ext(gsa-verify-retry) - acc_ext(model-alone)) — DEMOTED to a descriptive diagnostic (PROPOSED-ASM-1013): statistically unstable near the bridge floor, never verdict-bearing, reported with both lifts and no threshold

GS-A<->kernel identity DIAGNOSTIC, populated ONLY when the PROPOSED-ASM-1105 fallback arm ran: fraction of (item, seed) external-correctness bits identical across gsa-verify-retry and kernel-verify-retry — expected 1.0 under the A1 certificate; breakage (e.g. cross-container numeric nondeterminism) is read as a diagnostic to investigate, never an endpoint (DECONF §9.5)
dual-scored membership-gold accuracies on the SAME final answers — DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (circularity-signature context), never Holm, never verdict-bearing

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: deconf-b is a formal/oracle-addressed covered-slice G2-class DIAGNOSTIC (PROPOSED-ASM-1014) — never W1, never G4; it licenses NO competitiveness sentence in any direction. BM25-only is a cheap lexical PRECURSOR: 'no generic signal reproduces it' and 'no strong generic RAG baseline reproduces it' are BOTH outside the licence space — only 'the pinned lexical precursor (BM25 + pinned self-consistency acceptance) at matched budget does / does not'; the RAGC menu and manifest own every wider claim and supersede these cells for all G4/W1 use. R-1/SmolLM2-135M only: no extrapolation to the 100M-2B rung range; sign-only language is not licensed because no scale contrast exists here. A PASS (ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC) licenses exactly: verify-retry against an item-aligned deterministic answer key lifts a 135M host on this self-authored kernel-covered oracle-addressed slice; the kernel is one way to AUTHOR such a key; no kernel-specific runtime contribution is measured (A1) — routing all remaining kernel value to the authoring/economics legs (knull-v2 content, A-F0 mint cost). A NULL (ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE) is scoped to this instantiation and feeds K-P3v2(4) at this scope only. External-gold scoring inherits the d-adj-t protocol's own limits (single human judge-1 + one-model-family tie-break, as disclosed in the f2b-transfer record). Coverage disclosure, mandatory: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage. Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.
hypotheses: H-ALIGN (load-bearing): the external-gold verify-retry lift requires the item-aligned deterministic acceptance — Delta_align = acc_ext(gsa-verify-retry) - acc_ext(gr-d-lite) exceeds delta_sup = 0.05 (Holm-adjusted one-sided test, PROPOSED-ASM-1107); combined with the A1 certificate (the checker reads nothing beyond the urn-keyed answer-key projection) the licensed sentence on PASS is exactly: verify-retry against an item-aligned deterministic answer key lifts a 135M host on this self-authored kernel-covered oracle-addressed slice; the kernel is one way to AUTHOR such a key; no kernel-specific runtime contribution is measured. [rider: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity]

H-GENERIC (the alternative, equal prominence): the generic lexical loop reproduces the aligned-key arm within delta_eq = 0.05 (TOST: 90% BCa CI of Delta_align inside the band) => ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE — the measured input to the K-P3v2(4) attribution-collapse kill at this scope (and this scope only; the programme-level kill still requires the RAGC manifest cells); the F2 line survives only as generic lexical retrieval + self-consistency retry at matched budget. [same rider]

H-BRIDGE (instrument premise, gated not hypothesised): the aligned-store lift itself reproduces on external gold at n=333 x 5 seeds — bridge gate lift_ext(gsa-verify-retry over model-alone) one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B, nothing attributed, and a bridge failure against the landed f2b-transfer stage-2 result (+0.2507 measured at the 250-prefix, PASS-PENDING-AUDIT) is a flagged inconsistency to investigate (ASM-0964). [same rider]
kill_criterion_verbatim: deconf-b feeds ONE kill and carries NO independent kill of its own: verdict NULL (ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE — the 90% BCa CI of Delta_align entirely inside +/-0.05 on the 333-item x 5-seed external-gold grid) is the measured input to the K-P3v2(4) attribution-collapse kill AT THIS SCOPE: the pinned lexical precursor (BM25 + self-consistency at matched budget through the identical retry topology) reproduces the aligned-key arm within the equivalence margin WITHOUT the aligned key, and the F2 line survives only as generic lexical retrieval + self-consistency retry at matched budget; the PROGRAMME-level kill still requires the RAGC manifest cells at G4. The deflationary outcome gets EQUAL prominence with any positive (the knull discipline verbatim), with the rescue paths named IN the verdict: (i) authored-content superiority (knull-v2 PASS-CONTENT), (ii) authoring economics (A-F0), (iii) any A1/A2 post-triage residual candidate — none licensed by this record. Degeneracy discipline: P10 extraction failure, RT-7a non-engagement, baseline saturation and bridge failure are INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B by pre-registered gates — they can never read as PASS, NULL, or INCONCLUSIVE evidence. Rider on every sentence, verbatim: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: R1 only (already cached; PROPOSED-ASM-1106). NO R3, NO PRM in this design

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN (fresh-runs pre-commitment, ASM-0964 / deconf-stageb-spec.md §3): no logged cell of any frozen record can serve as this record's arm outputs — (1) the eval set differs from every logged f2b-line cell (ALL 333 resolved-gold_ext items, not the stage-2 250-prefix), (2) the seed set differs ({0..4} vs {0,1,2}), (3) gsa-verify-retry / gr-a-lite / gr-d-lite cells exist in no log, and (4) DECONF-B pre-commits to consuming NO logged cell (comparability with stage-2 is a labelled DIAGNOSTIC, never verdict-bearing across records); the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision

runner_constraints.hardware: single GPU (A100-40GB preferred; A10G acceptable); image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes before any final-phase run
runner_constraints.harness: poc/deconf-b (stageb_runner.py + modal_deconfb.py): a NEW hash-pinned module importing the PINNED f2b/f2bt machinery and the A1 GSAVerifier; poc/f2b and poc/f2b-transfer stay byte-identical at shas b62c3a72... / 810dcbc5... (PROPOSED-ASM-1108 — any f2b_runner edit voids the A1 invariance lemma and forces an A1 re-run)
runner_constraints.modal_image_reuse: the pinned f2b image im-6uXR6RyVQV15h2B3gtpOG2 (requirements sha 0fac7243...) — the exact image the f2b-transfer stage-2 FULL run executed on; repo-mounted stdlib additions only, NO image build (PROPOSED-ASM-1106); 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after every attached run; launch long runs nohup+setsid (standing memory)
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: ORDER, enforced: (1) coordinator registers PROPOSED-ASM-1100..1109 (registry/assumptions.jsonl, append-only; ASM-1010..1017 already registered); (2) experiment-designer role freezes this record via prereg-freeze after green mock + pre-freeze skeptic pass, setting runner_constraints.kernel_arm and pinning power-sim-result.json; (3) reuse-check.py check --record registry/experiments/deconf-b.json --gate recorded pre-spend; (4) ops amendment fills pins.harness_manifest with the sha printed by modal_deconfb.py --print-manifest; (5) runner role: modal mock (transport smoke), dry-plan vs caps, then the single <= 3 GPU-h final run; (6) verdict-gen mechanical + cross-vendor Codex audit on readout. Designer never runs/grades; runner never designs/concludes

title: deconf-b (P3-E-DECONF-B, DECONF/1 Stage B) — the aligned-generic-store deconfound: does the f2b external-gold verify-retry lift require the ITEM-ALIGNED deterministic answer key, or does a generic lexical-retrieval store (BM25 precursor) with a generic menu acceptance signal (self-consistency, RAGC frozen-menu item (i)) at matched budget through the IDENTICAL retry topology reproduce it? Primary Delta_align = acc_ext(gsa-verify-retry) - acc_ext(gr-d-lite) on the full 333-item resolved-gold_ext d-qa-t set x 5 seeds, paired BCa + TOST + Holm per RAGC §8.4 (PROPOSED-ASM-1013/1100/1107). G2-class covered-slice DIAGNOSTIC — never W1, never G4; BM25-only is a cheap lexical PRECURSOR, never a 'strong generic RAG baseline'; R-1/135M only. VERDICT-NAME MAPPING (pinned): PASS == ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC; NULL == ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE (equal prominence, the K-P3v2(4) input at this scope); INCONCLUSIVE == INCONCLUSIVE-UNDERPOWERED; INSTRUMENT-INVALID == INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B. RIDER on every verdict sentence, verbatim (ASM-1017): self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.
